summary: Iteration 48 - Creator Control Room / Father Agent feature testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The Creator Control Room at /creator displays real-time intelligence data from MongoDB including system health metrics, prioritized insights (critical/high/medium/info), friction points, top used procedures, stalled practices, and activity trends. Security controls verified: admin user cannot see Statistics link, cannot access /creator (redirected to /dashboard), and backend returns 403 for non-creator users.

details: GET /api/creator/father returns 200 for creator user (gegexia94@gmail.com)
Response contains health section with all required metrics
Response contains insights array with prioritized cards
Response contains friction_points, top_used, stalled_practices, daily_activity arrays
Response contains generated_at timestamp
GET /api/creator/father returns 403 for admin user (admin@aic.it)
Error message: 'Accesso riservato al creatore'
Unauthenticated request to /api/creator/father returns 401/403
Creator user redirected to /creator after login
Control Room page loads with data-testid='creator-control-room'
Page title shows 'Control Room' with 'Father Agent — Intelligenza operativa' subtitle
System Health section visible (data-testid='system-health')
Shows real data: 27 users, 27 active practices, 2 completed, 3 blocked, 2 waiting docs, 10 stalled 7g+
Critical badge shows '1 critici' when critical issues exist
Father Insights section visible (data-testid='father-insights')
Shows prioritized insight cards with data-testid='insight-{priority}'
All priority levels found: critical, high, medium, info
Cards show signal, explanation, action, and optional link
Friction Points panel visible (data-testid='friction-points')
Shows blocked procedures: vat_registration (2), Chiusura societaria (2), Apertura Partita IVA (1)
Top Procedures panel visible (data-testid='top-procedures')
Shows usage data: vat_registration (20), tax_declaration (9), VAT_REGISTRATION (7), other (2), company_formation (2)
Stalled Practices section visible (data-testid='stalled-practices')
Shows practices idle 7+ days with client names and days idle
Practices are clickable links to practice detail pages
Activity Trend chart visible (data-testid='activity-trend')
Shows last 7 days activity as bar chart
Refresh button visible (data-testid='father-refresh')
Button shows 'Aggiorna' text
Clicking refresh reloads data successfully
Security footer visible with creator-only disclaimer
Text: 'Area riservata al Creator. Nessun utente admin o standard ha accesso. I dati di Father sono generati in tempo reale dal sistema.'
Admin user (admin@aic.it) does NOT see Statistics link in sidebar
nav-admin-stats element not visible for admin
nav-creator-stats section not visible for admin
Admin user navigating to /creator gets redirected to /dashboard
CreatorControlRoom component checks isCreator and redirects non-creator users
Creator user CAN see Statistics link in sidebar (nav-admin-stats)
Creator user CAN see Control Room link in user menu (nav-creator)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified the Creator Control Room / Father Agent feature. Key data-testids: creator-control-room, system-health, father-insights, friction-points, top-procedures, stalled-practices, activity-trend, father-refresh, insight-{priority}. Creator user (gegexia94@gmail.com / Creator2026!) is redirected to /creator after login. Admin user (admin@aic.it / Admin123!) cannot see Statistics link, cannot access /creator (redirected to /dashboard), and backend returns 403. The Father endpoint at /api/creator/father returns real MongoDB data including health metrics, prioritized insights, friction points, top used procedures, stalled practices, and daily activity.
